name: Parent-o-bot

consumes.minimum: 1 active CompItem + 1 selected target layer; comp must contain at least 1 additional layer to act as parent controller
consumes.description: Reads app.project.activeItem (CompItem), iterates all comp layers to populate the dialog listbox, reads comp.selectedLayers for target layers, reads layer names and indices to resolve parent assignments, and reads existing effects to remove stale Multi_Parent instances before re-applying.

controls.name: Layer List
controls.role: selects up to two parent controller layers from all comp layers

controls.name: Cancel
controls.role: dismisses the dialog without applying any changes

controls.name: OK
controls.role: confirms parent selection and triggers Multi_Parent effect application and expression generation

functions: validate active composition and selected target layers before opening dialog
present listbox dialog listing all comp layers for parent selection
remove existing Multi_Parent pseudo-effect from each target layer
write FFX binary to temp file and apply Multi_Parent pseudo-effect preset to each target layer
set Parent 1 (and optionally Parent 2) layer-picker values on Multi_Parent effect
generate and assign Position blending expression to each target layer's Transform/Position
generate and assign Scale blending expression to each target layer's Transform/Scale
generate and assign Rotation blending expression to each target layer's Transform/Rotation
generate and assign Opacity blending expression to each target layer's Transform/Opacity
wrap all operations in an undo group

scriptSim.scenario: success — one target layer, one parent selected in dialog
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Rig Comp' (1920x1080, 5 s, 30 fps) with two layers: 'Controller' (Null, index 1) and 'Target Shape' (Shape, index 2). 'Target Shape' is the selected target layer. Dialog: listbox item 0 ('Controller') selected, OK clicked.

sim.note: Sweeps Position Influence slider 0-100; at 0 the layer's own position is returned unchanged, at 100 the position is fully blended toward the parent layer's position via linear().
Sweeps Scale Influence slider 0-100; uses proportional scale adjustment relative to the parent's scale, blending via linear() from the layer's own scale toward the adjusted parent-relative scale.
Sweeps Rotation Influence slider 0-100; at 0 returns own rotation, at 100 blends fully toward the parent layer's rotation via linear().
Sweeps Opacity Influence slider 0-100; at 0 returns own opacity, at 100 blends fully toward the parent layer's opacity via linear().

notes: The script has a variable-scope quirk: createExpression is called outside the per-target-layer loop and references `currentLayer`, which retains the last iteration's value — so expressions are always applied to the final target layer only, even when multiple layers are selected.
The Multi_Parent pseudo-effect is applied via a binary FFX blob written to the OS temp folder at runtime; applyPreset requires a real AE instance and cannot be simulated purely in JS.

Effect controls (Parent 1/2 layer pickers, Property Selector group, Position/Rotation/Scale/Opacity checkboxes, and influence sliders) are part of the pseudo-effect in AE's Effect Controls panel — they are not ScriptUI dialog controls.
Influence sliders on the pseudo-effect range 0-100 (percent); the expressions divide by 100 to normalise to 0-1 before passing to linear().
The selection-change listener on the listbox alerts if more than 2 items are selected but does not prevent it; the actual guard is at OK-time (`selectedItems.length <= 2`).
Compatible with 2D and 3D layers; works alongside existing AE parent constraints.
